article_meta.title: Classes of more than 70 students amid historic declines in test scores 02:12 â¢ Source: CNN Classes o

reasoning: The summary remains neutral, paraphrases findings without adopting emotive or rhetorical language from the source, and avoids editorializing. It attributes data to the NWEA study. Minor issue: sources_represented lists only CNN instead of including NWEA, but this does not reflect framing inheritance.

custom_reasoning.spin: Uses neutral verbs and descriptors; no charged phrasing.
custom_reasoning.unsubstantiated_claims: All claims are tied to the NWEA study or its recommendations.
custom_reasoning.opinion_as_fact: No subjective judgments presented as facts; evaluative statements are attributed to the study.
custom_reasoning.sensationalism: No alarming or emotive language; tone is measured.
custom_reasoning.mudslinging: No personal attacks or character judgments.
custom_reasoning.mind_reading: No attributions of unverified motives or thoughts.
custom_reasoning.slant: Reflects the single-study perspective proportionally; no undue emphasis beyond reported findings.
custom_reasoning.bias_by_omission: Includes key findings and recommendations present in the article; no major perspective omitted in the summary.
custom_reasoning.subjective_adjectives: Avoids loaded adjectives; uses factual descriptors.
custom_reasoning.negativity_bias: Conveys challenges and recommendations consistent with the source without amplifying negativity.
custom_reasoning.elite_populist_bias: Treats the research organization’s findings as reported facts without privileging or dismissing other groups.
custom_reasoning.framing_neutrality: More neutral than the source’s occasional emotive quotes; avoids metaphors and subjective tone.
custom_reasoning.perspective_completeness: Summary reflects NWEA’s perspective, but sources_represented lists only CNN and omits NWEA, creating a minor completeness issue.
